title: Forming a joint venture, Erajaya Swasembada spent IDR 52.2 billion of investment
body: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA), a retailer specialised in telecommunication devices, has formed another joint venture (JV) through one of its subsidiaries, PT Era Sukses Abadi (ESA).

title: Q3 saw AALI scoring profit of IDR 800.15 billion in Q3
body: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI) bagged net profit of IDR 801.15 billion in Q3 2024, a slight increase from IDR 800.57 billion.

title: Aneka Tambang to loan Feni Haltim IDR 124.8 billion
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) will channel a shareholder loan facility to one of its affiliates, PT Feni Haltim (FHT), worth IDR 124.8 billion.

title: Foreign selling volume recorded greater, net foreign volume falls to -1.09 billion shares
body: On Friday, October 25, foreign selling volume (3.92 billion shares) outpaced foreign buying volume (2.82 billion shares). As a result, net foreign volume fell to -1.09 billion shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares sold, with foreign investors selling 1.30 billion shares for a net volume of -262 million shares.

title: JCI slipped nearing the closing bell
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) arrived at 7,604.56 nearing the end of today’s (29/10) session at 3 PM WIB.

title: Forming a joint venture, Erajaya Swasembada spent IDR 52.2 billion of investment
body: PT Erajaya Swasembada Tbk (ERAA), a retailer specialised in telecommunication devices, has formed another joint venture (JV) through one of its subsidiaries, PT Era Sukses Abadi (ESA).

title: Q3 saw AALI scoring profit of IDR 800.15 billion in Q3
body: PT Astra Agro Lestari Tbk (AALI) bagged net profit of IDR 801.15 billion in Q3 2024, a slight increase from IDR 800.57 billion.

title: Aneka Tambang to loan Feni Haltim IDR 124.8 billion
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) will channel a shareholder loan facility to one of its affiliates, PT Feni Haltim (FHT), worth IDR 124.8 billion.

title: Foreign selling volume recorded greater, net foreign volume falls to -1.09 billion shares
body: On Friday, October 25, foreign selling volume (3.92 billion shares) outpaced foreign buying volume (2.82 billion shares). As a result, net foreign volume fell to -1.09 billion shares. The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares sold, with foreign investors selling 1.30 billion shares for a net volume of -262 million shares.

title: JCI slipped nearing the closing bell
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) arrived at 7,604.56 nearing the end of today’s (29/10) session at 3 PM WIB.

title: Up 19.1%, BFI Finance new financing hit IDR 14.2 trillion in Q3
body: PT BFI Finance Tbk (BFIN), a consumer financing company with the biggest market capitalisation, reported new distributed financing of IDR 14.2 trillion until September (9M) 2024.

title: ASSA’s profit skyrocketed 79.82% in Q3 2024
body: Net profit of PT Adi Sarana Armada Tbk (ASSA) shot up 79.82% year-on-year (yoy) to IDR 212.67 billion in Q3 2024 from IDR 118.26 billion seen in the same period in 2023.

title: Q3 2024 saw improvement, PWON scored profit of IDR 1.66 trillion
body: PT Pakuwon Jati Tbk (PWON) booked revenue and profit growth of 11.76% and 4.74% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024.

title: Antam to work with PLN to supply 150 MVA for Kolaka smelter
body: PT Aneka Tambang Tbk (ANTM) or Antam has formed a strategic partnership with PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (PLN) to provide an electricity supply of 150 megavolt ampere (MVA) for the ferronickel smelting facility of Antam in Pomalaa, Kolaka, Southeast Sulawesi.

title: Baramulti Suksessarana to distribute interim dividend of USD 30 million
body: Interim dividend of PT Baramulti Suksessarana Tbk (BSSR) for the fiscal year (FY) of 2024 increased 50% to USD 30 million from USD 20 million seen in FY 2023.

title: Starting the new week, JCI remains idle until afternoon
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (JCI) remained at the green zone throughout today’s (28/10) session until 3 PM WIB.

title: FAPA bags dividend income of IDR 47.5 billion from subsidiary
body: PT FAP Agri Tbk (FAPA), an agricultural product company, is announcing a dividend income received from one of its subsidiaries, PT Tirta Madu Sawit Jaya (TMSJ).

title: Abstaining for a decade, WINS is back with interim dividend of IDR 34.91 billion
body: PT Wintermar Offshore Marine Tbk (WINS) will distribute interim dividend of IDR 34.91 billion or IDR 8 per share, taken out of its net profit in 2024.

title: Jhonlin Agro Raya provides IDR 1.4 trillion worth of asset to secure refinance
body: PT Jhonlin Agro Raya Tbk (JARR), a palm refinery company, has guaranteed its assets worth IDR 1.4 trillion to PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI).

title: Controlling shareholder buys up 130 million Lima Dua Lima Tiga (LUCY) shares
body: The majority stake in PT Lima Dua Lima Tiga Tbk (LUCY), held by PT Delta Wibawa Bersama, increased by over 130.02 million shares on Thursday, October 24. This controller raised its position from 49.5% to 58.09% through the transaction through PT BCA Sekuritas. Lucy in the Sky is a rooftop bar located in Jakarta's Sudirman Central Business District (SCBD) that is owned and operated by LUCY, a food and beverage company.

title: Q3 2024 saw PLN’s profit slowed down to IDR 25.13 trillion
body: The net profit of PT Perusahaan Listrik Negara (Persero) slowed down 3.29% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024, although the revenue grew 12.42% yoy from Q3 2023.

title: BUMA to secure mining service contract worth IDR 107.8 trillion
body: PT Bukit Makmur Mandiri Utama (BUMA) has amended coal mining service contract involving PT Indonesia Pratama (IPR), a subsidiary of PT Bayan Resources Tbk (BYAN). BUMA is known to be the subsidiary of usaha PT Delta Dunia Makmur Tbk (DOID).

title: EMP Energi Jaya to conclude 51% acquisition of Sengkang Block
body: PT EMP Energi Jaya (EEJ), a subsidiary of PT Energi Mega Persada Tbk (ENRG), concluded the acquisition of 51% of KKS Sengkang Block, South Sulawesi, last week (25/10).

title: Scoring IDR 6.84 trillion in Q3, BSDE’s marketing sales reached 72% of 2024 target
body: PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk (BSDE), the biggest self-sustained city developer in Indonesia, booked marketing sales of IDR 6.84 trillion until the end of Q3 2024.

title: National automotive industry slowing down, Dharma Polimetal saw 20.7% drop in profit
body: PT Dharma Polimetal Tbk (DRMA), an automotive component manufacturer only scored net profit of IDR 412.07 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: RAJA and subsidiary to secure credit facility of USD 44.8 million from Bank Mandiri
body: PT Rukun Raharja Tbk (RAJA) and one of its subsidiaries, PT Triguna Internusa Pratama (TIP), has signed a credit facility agreement from PT Bank Mandiri (Persero) Tbk (BMRI) worth over USD 44.8 million.

title: Greenlit, GMFI to hold rights issue of 11.73 billion shares
body: PT Garuda Maintenance Facility Aero Asia Tbk (GMFI) to officially hold a rights issue of 11.73 billion shares or equal to a maximum of 41.7% of total issued and paid-up capital.

title: TAFS to issue Bond of IDR 1 trillion
body: PT Toyota Astra Financial Services (TAFS) will issue Shelf-Registration Bond IV Phase IV Year 2024 worth IDR 1 trillion.

title: ADHI secured new contracts of IDR 14.7 trillion
body: PT Adhi Karya (Persero) Tbk (ADHI) scored new contracts of IDR 14.2 trillion until the third quarter (Q3) of 2024.

title: Revenue slipped, BNBR’s net profit multiplied 4 times
body: PT Bakrie & Brothers Tbk (BBNR), a multi-sector holding company under Bakrie Group, booked net profit of IDR 636.27 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.

title: DCII bagged IDR 449.48 billion of profit in Q3 2024
body: PT DCI Indonesia Tbk (DCII) recoded profit growth of 21.34% year-on-year (yoy) in Q3 2024 to IDR 449.48 billion from IDR 370.42 billion seen in the same period last year.

title: Eyeing wider audience, BEER to launch new product
body: PT Jobubu Jarum Minahasa Tbk (BEER), an alcoholic beverage manufacturer, has launched a new product which is believed to possess a quite great of market potential.

title: Bumi Serpong Damai takes over 91.99% of Suryamas Dutamakmur (SMDM)
body: On Wednesday, October 23, PT Suryamas Dutamakmur Tbk (SMDM), a real estate development company, welcomed a new investor. After acquiring more than 4.39 billion shares, PT Bumi Serpong Damai Tbk was listed as the controller with a 91.99% share portion. PT Sinarmas Sekuritas made this massive share purchase possible.

title: FILM to issue up to 10% new shares in rights issue
body: PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM), a company engaged in movie production industry, will issue 10% of shares through the capital increase with pre-emptive rights, also known as rights issue.

title: Samuel Tumbuh Bersama releases 38 million Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera (NSSS) shares
body: More than 38 million shares of PT Nusantara Sawit Sejahtera Tbk (NSSS), a company that produces palm oil, were released by PT Samuel Tumbuh Bersama on Tuesday, October 22. Previously holding 25.64% of the shares, this investor's ownership stake slightly decreased to 25.48%. This transaction was handled by PT Samuel Sekuritas Indonesia.

title: Gojek Tokopedia shares sales hit 1.31 billion shares, net foreign volume -477.89 million shares
body: The digital company PT GoTo Gojek Tokopedia Tbk (GOTO) had the most shares sold on Thursday, October 24, with foreign investors selling 1.31 billion shares for a net volume of around -180.22 million shares. As a result, the foreign selling volume (4.23 billion shares) outpaced the foreign buying volume (3.75 billion shares). The discrepancy between these statistics resulted in net foreign volume of -477.89 million shares.

title: Foreign sales volume rises, net foreign volume closes at -98,99 million shares
body: On Wednesday, October 23, foreign sales volume climbed to 4.70 billion shares. Meanwhile, foreign buying volume totaled 4.70 billion shares, with net foreign volume closing at -98.99 million shares. The general mining contractor services business PT Darma Henwa Tbk (DEWA) had the most shares sold for around 233.36 million, with a net volume of -145.79 million shares.

title: SIDO to distribute interim dividend of IDR 540 billion
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Herbal Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) is allocating interim dividend of IDR 540 billion from its net profit of H1 2024.

title: Q3 2024 saw HEAL’s profit arrived at IDR 468.16 billion
body: The performance of PT Medikaloka Hermina Tbk (HEAL), the managing company of Hermina Hospital network, reportedly improved in the first nine months (9M) of 2024 compared to 9M 2023.

title: Sales declined, VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas’s net profit plummeted 45.9%
body: PT VKTR Teknologi Mobilitas Tbk (VKTR), an electric vehicle trading and manufacturing company under Bakrie Group, only recorded net profit of IDR 10.55 billion within the first nine months (9M) of 2024.
